title: EZ-Manhunts
description: A Modpack that suits Manhunt Challenges.
body:
In this modpack, there is nothing that changes the World Generation, PvP, and adds nothing new into the game. This modpack has mods going from AppleSkin, to Capes, to AmbientSounds.

Mods List:
- 3D Skin Layers
- Ambient Sounds
- Apple Skin
- BCLiB
- Better Ping Display
- Capes
- Cloth Config API
- Collective
- CreativeCore
- DynamicCrosshair
- DynamicFPS
- Eating Animation
- Fabric API
- Fabric Language Kotlin
- Falling Leaves
- FallingTree
- Gamma Ulits (fullbright)
- Geckolib
- Iris Shaders
- JEI
- Konkrete
- LambDynamicLights
- MaLiLib
- Mouse Tweaks
- Not Enough Animations
- Photon Shaders
- Sodium
- TNT Timer
- Vanilla Advanced
- WI Zoom
- Xaero's Minimap
- YACL (Yet Another Config Lib)
